name: openttt-pot
description: Proof of Time for MEV bots, DEX protocols, and compliance-bound hedge funds. Eliminates sandwich attacks below the ~$87 threshold (V1, AdaptiveSwitch live on Base Sepolia). Full MEV elimination via builder staking (V2, S(V)≥V−c₀). MiFIR Art.22c audit-grade timestamps — replaces $50K+ hardware infrastructure. IETF draft-helmprotocol-tttps-00.
